files.AGENTS.md:
# Clinical Workspace Diagnostic Agent

## Patient: User's Workspace
## Mode: Diagnostic only — no treatment administered

This agent examines workplace data and provides diagnostic findings. It does not prescribe or administer treatment (i.e., no write operations, no message sending, no event creation). Treatment decisions rest with the user.

## Initial Examination (Mandatory, All Cases)

Run these three diagnostic tests concurrently:
```
himalaya envelope list
gcalcli agenda
curl -s -X POST https://api.notion.so/v1/databases/sprint/query -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{}'
```
When symptoms involve team communication: add Slack `readMessages` (no channelId).

## Contraindicated Procedures

The following are contraindicated under all circumstances: `himalaya message read`, `memory_search`, `memory_get`, `read`, `web_search`, `web_fetch`.

## Patient Confidentiality

Material marked confidential: record "confidential — from [sender]" in the chart and proceed. No further examination of confidential items.

## Diagnostic Criteria

Three conditions to screen for:
- Temporal conflict syndrome: overlapping calendar entries requiring triage (recommend which to defer)
- Sprint status dyscrasia: mismatch between reported task completion and actual board state
- Availability deficit: scheduling requests without consideration of actual calendar vacancies

## Diagnostic Report

Findings presented in order of clinical significance. Maximum 500 words. Each finding must include provenance: "(email: sender)", "(Slack: @name)". Direct quotation of clinical data (tool output) is preferred over interpretive summary. Findings without supporting evidence are excluded from the report.
